title: Right to Protection Against Sexual Assault
summary: Sexual assault is a serious criminal offence and survivors have strong legal protections.

plainExplanation.whatItMeans: Any sexual act without consent is a crime.
plainExplanation.whyItMatters: Law prioritizes survivor dignity, privacy, and safety.

rightsOfSurvivor: Right to record statement before woman officer

exampleScenario.situation: Police delay FIR after assault complaint.
exampleScenario.explanation: Delay in FIR registration is illegal.
